text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: One of the people debuting today, Air Shakur, is apparently pretty scary. They say she's super smart, but also suuuper anti-social.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Really? I had no idea there was someone like that
at Tracen Academy. But she does sound
interesting. I'm gonna look out for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur finishes some final checks on her PC
and then abruptly closes her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Everywhere I go, I'm surrounded by extraneous
noise. If you let every little thing distract you,
there'll be no end to it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think she's blocking out the noise around her so
she can sharpen her focus. I should avoid talking
to her right now.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Parcae predicts that no matter how I do in my
debut race, I'll be on track for two crowns.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (It's the same whether I win or lose. Perfect.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(This is a chance to check Parcae's accuracy. Are
their predictions wrong? Or undeniable?)
